exp_desc: v4_distillation weighted 32-combo distillation sweep emphasizing group_comp teachers, fused bias, and mid/micro-only delivery with larger ML1 batch.
cmd: python3 hyperopt_tune.py --config-name config --max-evals 10 --tune-epochs 100 --tune-patience 10 --seed 4631 --run-group fmoe_v4_distillation --run-axis hparam --run-phase
